title: Egyptian-Style Turkey Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry recipe inspired by Egyptian cuisine, featuring tender turkey and crispy vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper and stir-fry until they start to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the ground turkey and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the cumin, coriander, and spicy stir-fry sauce, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened and the turkey is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
Note: This recipe serves 4-6 people, and can be adjusted to suit your taste preferences.
